name: OpenBuild
fullText:
Compute to AI. Consensus back to humans.
AI is no longer just a tool — it’s becoming an executor.
From browser-operating agents to on-chain AI making transactions, the Agent Economy is already taking shape.

So what happens when:
AI handles execution,
and humans focus on strategy https://t.co/5ToD8jmoll
